name: The Erotic King Game That You Must Be Loser
description:
All characters appearing in this work are 18 years old.

Your high school's boys baseball team won the national championship thanks to the efforts of four of its top players.

As the school beauty, you were forced to agree to attend their celebration banquet under pressure from your peers on campus.

After you enter the private room of the pub, you find that you are the only woman here. In addition, there are only four men from the baseball team of today's protagonists in this private room...

Depending on the setting, the background of the Persona you use will slightly affect the plot.
Use a Persona with huge breasts to get more sexual humiliation plots!

Please give feedback through public chat records! Thanks!
